hero.title: Manage Your Projects with Ease
hero.subtitle: Organize your team's tasks, create kanban boards, and track your projects from start to finish with TaskFlow.

taskManagement.title: Task Management
taskManagement.description: Create, assign, and prioritize your tasks. Track statuses and set deadlines with ease.

kanban.title: Kanban Board
kanban.description: Visualize your workflow with drag-and-drop kanban boards. Move tasks effortlessly.

teamCollaboration.title: Team Collaboration
teamCollaboration.description: Stay connected with your team through real-time notifications and comment system.

cta.title: Ready to Manage Your Projects?
cta.subtitle: Create a free account and get started right away.
